mapper.sql: ga.id, ga.guild_id, ga.game_partition_id, ga.user_id, ga.message, ga.status, ga.reject_reason, ga.reviewer_id, ga.review_time, ga.expire_time, ga.created_at, g.name as guild_name, u.nick_name as applicant_name, ru.nick_name as reviewer_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM guild_application ga LEFT JOIN guild g ON ga.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ga.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON ga.reviewer_id = ru.user_id WHERE ga.id IS NOT NULL AND ga.guild_id = #{guildId} AND ga.user_id = #{userId} AND u.nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{applicantName}, '%') AND ga.status = #{status} ORDER BY ga.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM guild_application ga LEFT JOIN guild g ON ga.guild_id = g.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ga.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON ga.reviewer_id = ru.user_id WHERE ga.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_application SET guild_id = #{guildId}, game_partition_id = #{gamePartitionId}, user_id = #{userId}, message = #{message}, status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_time = #{reviewTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM guild_application WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE guild_application SET status = #{status}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, review_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE guild_application SET status = #{status}, review_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
